title: GT1 Combustion Inspection - 24000 Hour
description: Full combustion inspection under GE LTSA. All 14 combustion cans inspected. Transition pieces inspected and 4 replaced. Fuel nozzles flow-tested and refurbished. Compressor inlet bellmouth inspected clean. Controls calibration and governor tuning. Plant returned to service March 21 2025 on schedule.

title: GT2 Hot Gas Path Inspection - 48000 Hour
description: Full hot gas path inspection under GE LTSA. Stage 1 2 and 3 buckets replaced (new from GE). Stage 1 and 2 nozzles replaced. Stage 3 nozzles - 8 of 24 replaced due to tip cracking (change order). Combustion liners all 14 replaced proactively. Plant returned to service October 2 2025. Four-day schedule extension for additional nozzle scope.

title: SST-900 Annual Minor Inspection
description: Annual minor inspection per Siemens maintenance agreement. Lube oil flush and analysis. Seal steam system inspection. Governing valve exercise and calibration. Vibration baseline trending. No issues found. Turbine remains in good mechanical condition.

title: CT-1 Annual Nozzle and Fill Inspection
description: Annual inspection of cooling tower fill media nozzles and drift eliminators. Fill sections 12 of 48 panels showing degradation replaced. All nozzles inspected and 28 replaced for plugging. Fan motor lubrication and blade inspection complete. Approach temperature improved 0.8 degrees F after servicing.

equipment_name: HRSG Unit 1 - Heat Recovery Steam Generator
title: HRSG-1 Annual Inspection and Tube Cleaning
description: Annual HRSG inspection. HP superheater tubes cleaned with high-pressure water. Duct burner inspection - no burner installed this unit. HP drum water chemistry review. Safety valve as-found testing - all 4 lifted within 3% of set pressure. No tube leaks detected. Economizer fin inspection satisfactory.

title: EDG Annual Load Bank Test
description: Annual load bank test at 100% rated load for 2 hours per NFPA 110. Engine started and loaded to 2000 kW. Voltage 4160V frequency 60.1 Hz within limits. Fuel consumption verified. Coolant and lube oil samples collected. Transfer to normal power and back tested. Pass.

title: BFP-1 Mechanical Seal Replacement
description: HP boiler feed pump developed mechanical seal leak on outboard face October 2025. Pump isolated and seal replaced with upgraded design. Run-in test at full flow satisfactory. Pump returned to service within 36 hours of isolation.

title: Demin System - RO Membrane Replacement
description: Reverse osmosis membrane bank replacement per 3-year schedule. All 168 membrane elements replaced. System permeate quality restored to less than 0.1 microsiemens per cm. EDI polishing system performance confirmed. Water chemistry within ASME boiler water limits for all three pressure levels.
